2026-0223
2026-03-13PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActAppointment of a full-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaAppointment of David Hall of St. Albert, Alberta, to be a full-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of five years, effective April 7, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a full-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Appointment of David Hall of St. Albert, Alberta, to be a full-time member of the Prairies Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of five years, effective April 7, 2026.
